narrative:
Lancaster City has 25,311 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.5 percentage points.
